name: psplpy

metadata.name: psplpy
metadata.summary: The Personal Study Purposes Library of PYthon.

documentation:
# PSPLPY

The **P**ersonal **S**tudy **P**urposes **L**ibrary of **PY**thon.

It's only a python library for personal study purposes.

methods.name: psplpy.image_det.ImgDet._filter_rects
documentation: if the two rectangles overlap percentage greater than the threshold, remove the second rectangle

methods.name: psplpy.image_det.ImgDet.get_box
documentation: return: (Rect, confidence) or None

methods.name: psplpy.image_det.ImgDet.get_boxes
documentation: return: [(Rect1, confidence1), (Rect2, confidence2), ...] or []

modules.name: psplpy.scripts.fix_labelImg
documentation: Above Python3.9, the labelImg will collapse

functions.name: psplpy.file_utils.auto_rename
documentation: If the file name has existed, add (n) after the file name and return, or return the original name.

methods.name: psplpy.network_utils.MpHttpClient.submit
documentation: Getting the task_id for fetching data from the server

methods.name: psplpy.network_utils.MpHttpClient.fetch
documentation: The max timeout time depends on the setting of the server

methods.name: psplpy.network_utils.MpHttpClient.get_progress
documentation: return the tuple (finished_task_num, total_task_num)

methods.name: psplpy.ocr_utils.OcrServer.unify_format
documentation:
format text info list to: [[[[left top], [right top], [right bottom], [left bottom]], text, confidence], ...]
for instance:             [[[[49, 5], [89, 5], [89, 19], [49, 19]], 'Text', 0.0004511636577615576], ...]

functions.name: psplpy.other_utils.recursive_convert
documentation: Recursively convert the lists and tuples are nested within each other to only tuples or lists

functions.name: psplpy.other_utils.split_list
documentation: Split a list into n equal length sublists in original order

classes.name: psplpy.other_utils.ClassProperty
documentation:
A decorator similar to 'property', but with the ability to use the class to access it,
and the 'fget' method receives the class as its argument, rather than an instance

methods.name: psplpy.other_utils.TimeoutChecker.__init__
documentation: unique_id is required when two or more instances existing simultaneously, e.g. using threading

class_variables.name: psplpy.other_utils.ScreenShotMaker.PNG
documentation: using PIL saves to png, the smallest size, but the longest time

class_variables.name: psplpy.other_utils.ScreenShotMaker.BMP
documentation: using PIL saves to bmp, the biggest size, but the shortest time

class_variables.name: psplpy.other_utils.ScreenShotMaker.PNG_OPENCV
documentation: using opencv saves to png, medium size and time

documentation: whether a rect is inside the self_rect

methods.name: psplpy.image_utils.Rect.overlap_pct

documentation: Convert the bit value to bytes. The length specifies the number of bytes.

methods.name: psplpy.serialization_utils.BitManipulator.__format__
documentation: Support custom formatting: 'b' for binary, 'o' for octal, 'x' for hex, 'd' for decimal.
